final_decision.next_human_decision: Decide whether to design a harder replicated benchmark to test B-vs-C discriminability.
final_decision.rationale: The repaired collection removed the A-condition leakage and produced a valid local A/B/C diagnostic. C improves over A on one backend-certificate case, but C ties B under the frozen required dimensions, so no C-over-B promotion is supported.

non_claims: No release readiness, public benchmark validity, scientific validation, product capability, broad theorem-proving, proof-correctness beyond scoped certified obligations, or general model reliability claim is made.
The repaired result is a local diagnostic with one response per prompt and non-randomized collection order.
